bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

user.description: Select the Fellow Stagg EKG+ kettle to set up.

abort.no_devices_found: No Fellow Stagg EKG+ kettles found. Make sure the kettle is powered and within range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy, and not connected to another app or bridge.

init.title: Fellow Stagg EKG+ options
init.description: How Home Assistant talks to the kettle over Bluetooth.

data_description.connection_mode: Persistent stays connected for live updates. On demand connects only when you control the kettle, then disconnects shortly after it turns off; while disconnected it shows the last known state and can't see a power-on done at the kettle.

poll.title: Background poll
poll.description: On demand only. Briefly reconnect on a schedule to catch a power-on done at the kettle.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to check while the kettle is off. Lower notices a power-on sooner but uses the adapter more. Off keeps the adapter free.
